name_cn:
In stock 🔥
Iconic Medium Baguette handbag, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic closure, internal compartment with deep brown fabric lining, zip pocket, and gold metal hardware. The bag comes with a detachable leather handle and shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 26x15.5cm
Style 8600
